subject: An armored rider on a horned horse stands atop a rocky promontory, surveying the horizon with a long spear held upright
description: A lone armored rider sits mounted on a large horned horse at the crest of a rocky outcrop. Massive stone columns or ruins rise on either side in the background, silhouetted against a warm amber-gold sky filled with haze. The rider holds a long spear vertically and appears to be scanning the distance. The entire scene is rendered in warm gold and ochre tones, creating a monumental, sentinel-like mood. The rider's armor and the horse's form are clearly visible but detail is obscured by the warm haze and distance of the composition.
foreground: Armored rider on horned horse atop rocky cliff edge
background: Tall stone columns or ruined towers in warm haze
emotion: vigilant, stoic — the rider is alert and surveying
